parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant User
participant CouponPage
participant DB_Beanstalkd
participant UserMail

User -> CouponPage : Load merchant page with cashback
CouponPage --> User : Return page with discounts
User -> CouponPage : Clicks on cashback
CouponPage --> User : Returns 2 tabs, on tab 1 the reflink to merchant,\n on tab 2 a popup with cashback formular(email)
User -> CouponPage : Fills email, submits form
CouponPage --> DB_Beanstalkd : Saves cashback request
CouponPage --> User : Sends new content for checkout popup, simultaneosly\n opens reflink with uaid in a new tab(3)
CouponPage --> UserMail : Sends new email with link to cashback form
@enduml
```
